flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Community College of Allegheny County vs the 2018–2022 baseline (9.3k vs 12.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Community College of Allegheny County fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (10.6k → 9.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community College of Allegheny County fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Community College of Allegheny County rose 57% between 2006 and 2009 (7.0% → 11.0%).
